title: Temporary Recruitment Assistant (Contract: 3 Months)
description:
Contract Duration

·        3 Months (Estimated to be from Mar 2026 to May 2026)

Working Location

·        City Hall

Working Hours

  • 5 Days (Mon to Fri: 9.00am to 6.30pm)
  • Lunch: 1 hour

Offered Salary

·        S$2,800 to $4,500 per month (Depending on qualifications and experience & subject to client’s approval)

Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree holder
  • Prior experience in a HR function or secretarial work will be preferred
  • University/tertiary students will be considered as well
  • Clear written and verbal communication
  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills
  • Strong organisation and coordination abilities
  • Comfortable with digital recruitment tools (i.e. X0pa)
  • Detail-oriented and meticulous

Job Description

Recruitment and Selection

1.     Conduct basic screening and shortlisting of resumes received

2.     Plan and organise interview sessions, including creating interview schedules and facilitating timely communication with candidates

3.     Liaise and coordinate with partnering agencies for joint panel interviews, ensuring alignment on interview processes and evaluation criteria

4.     Arrange logistics for both physical and virtual interview sessions, including booking meeting rooms, setting up video conferencing tools, and preparing interview materials

5.     Communicate outcomes to applicants professionally and promptly

6.     Manage and respond to candidate queries throughout the recruitment process


Database and Knowledge Management

1.     Maintain efficient data management to manage job applicants and new hires database

2.     Maintain accurate and up-to-date records of all recruitment activities, ensuring timely filing and updates

3.     Create and maintain a knowledge base of frequently asked questions and best practices for recruitment processes

4.     Assist in preparing reports for management on recruitment metrics and key performance indicators (KPIs) and other relevant metrics

5.     Ensure compliance with data protection regulations in handling personal information


Programmme Administration & Operations

1.     Provide administrative and operational support to the programme team as required

2.     Assist in organising and managing logistics for dialogues with agency partners

3.     Prepare and distribute programme-related materials and communications
